applications.name: Security POC 2
applications.title: Security POC 2: Responds to demo.GetPrices
applications.description: Sell-side application demonstrating the FDC3 security model. Handles the demo.GetPrices intent: verifies the requesting application's JWS signature on the inbound fdc3.instrument context, then returns a private channel over which encrypted fdc3.valuation snapshots are broadcast using symmetric key encryption.
